jobs.title: IT Support Specialist
jobs.summary: Keeps classroom technology running smoothly by resolving AV and network issues across campus spaces.
details: Deployed, configured, and maintained AV hardware and network-connected devices across 30+ classrooms, ensuring 99%+ uptime for academic operations.
Applied ITIL-aligned incident management using ServiceNow to track, prioritize, and resolve support tickets from faculty and students.
Coordinated with IT and facilities teams to document recurring issues, identify root causes, and implement preventive solutions.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager
jobs.summary: Oversees store operations, supports the team, and uses data to improve daily efficiency.
details: Managed end-to-end store operations including staff supervision, scheduling, inventory management, and vendor coordination.
Analyzed sales and inventory data to optimize stock levels, reduce waste, and improve operational efficiency.
Implemented process improvements in cash handling and compliance documentation demonstrating project ownership.

jobs.title: Residential Advisor
jobs.summary: Builds community, handles incidents, and supports residents in a busy campus living environment.
details: Managed programming and community-building for 350+ residents in a diverse residential environment.
Applied crisis management protocols and incident response procedures, maintaining thorough documentation.
Mediated conflicts and enforced policies while collaborating with staff to escalate and resolve issues efficiently.

jobs.title: SOAR Intern & Orientation Staff
jobs.summary: Coordinated orientation logistics and technical setup for large student welcome events.
details: Coordinated administrative and technical logistics for orientation events serving 15,000+ incoming students and families.
Configured AV/presentation systems; diagnosed and resolved real-time technical failures during live events.
Collaborated across a cross-functional team (Directors, Coordinators, Tech Manager) to execute deliverables on time.
